productDisplayName: Mother Earth Women Printed Red Tunic
description: Composition Red and beige sleeveless printed tunic made of 100% cotton, has a halter neckline with a wrap-around connecting with a button detail at the nape of the neck, stitch detail on the chest and a panel stitched on the midriff Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not soak Certain fabrics will shrink mother earth's focus on providing livelihoods for rural artisans resulted in this handmade tunic that fuses earthy goodness with a modern cut and silhouette. This piece epitomises how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian tunic. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings and embellished slippers. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
